version-guard.run: branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD); if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then version=$(cargo metadata --no-deps --format-version 1 | jq -r '.packages[0].version'); if [ "$version" != "0.0.0" ]; then echo "error: Cargo.toml version must be 0.0.0 on main (got $version)"; exit 1; fi; fi
